data.name: This Time - Part One
data.detailed_description:
OFFICIALLY RE-ACTIVATED

Ignore the rumors—this game is no longer on hiatus. A new developer took the reins in early 2026, delivering the final Chapter One update and a visual overhaul. We are back, we are active, and Part Two is coming next!


關於此遊戲

THIS TIME – Part One is an erotic thriller choice-driven adult visual novel about corruption, temptation, and impossible powers that defy the laws of physics.

You play as a former firefighter turned private investigator, a man who once dreamed of being a hero—until he uncovered evidence of corruption within the fire department… and felt the pull to become corrupt himself. Unable to trust his own morals, he retired.

Until a mysterious young woman crashes into his life, begging for help finding her missing friend.

In exchange for your help, she offers you something impossible:
A stopwatch that can freeze time.

But the stopwatch may not be the only power in play. As your investigation deepens, you’ll begin to uncover signs that others may possess abilities that bend reality itself—such as reading and influencing the minds of others.

With time — and perhaps other forces — at your command, every choice becomes more dangerous.

Now you must investigate a city rotting from the inside, uncover a conspiracy that hides its crimes behind fire and ash—and decide whether you will remain a hero… or become the very thing you once hated.

This Time – Part One begins the story. Future parts will continue the narrative as paid standalone sequels, with full save and choice carryover.

🔥 Core Features

  • Choice-Driven Adult Visual Novel – Your decisions shape relationships, character outcomes, and the story’s moral direction.

  • Erotic Thriller & Supernatural Mystery Narrative – A dark, grounded story blended with impossible powers and hidden forces.

  • Time-Freezing & Reality-Bending Abilities – Time is only the beginning.

  • Multiple Romance Routes & Outcomes – Each woman has her own personality, values, and reactions to your choices.

  • Naturally Integrated Adult Content – Erotic scenes arise organically from story and relationships.

  • High Replayability Through Branching Paths – Different decisions lead to different consequences, routes, and endings.

🕒 About the Experience

THIS TIME is not a lighthearted adult comedy. It is a serious, character-driven erotic thriller where absolute power invites absolute corruption.

When physics itself can be broken, the only real limit is your conscience.

data.short_description: A former firefighter turned private investigator gains the power to freeze time in this choice-driven erotic thriller visual novel—where hidden supernatural abilities, corruption, and dangerous temptation collide.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: Any
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Any
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any

最低配備:
